meaning: n.衣柜,衣厨,衣室,衣服,行头,剧装
examples: Jeans are a staple part of everyone's wardrobe.
Upstairs, the master bedroom has a walk-in wardrobe.
There were several expensive suits hanging in the wardrobe.
He gets a new wardrobe every three years from work-wear maker Williamson-Dickie Manufacturing Co.
"They were like theatre costume, " said Judy Reith, one of the band's stage wardrobe team.
